allow: PowerShell($nm = Get-Item node_modules; "node_modules LinkType: $\($nm.LinkType\)"; "node_modules Target : $\($nm.Target\)"; "node_modules size  : $\([math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem node_modules -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB, 1\)\) MB"; ""; "C:\\dev-cache\\werkstatt-modules size: $\([math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem C:\\dev-cache\\werkstatt-modules -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB, 1\)\) MB"; ""; $next = Get-Item .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ".next LinkType : $\($next.LinkType\)"; ".next Target  : $\($next.Target\)")

PowerShell($nm = \(Get-ChildItem node_modules -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; $store = \(Get-ChildItem C:\\dev-cache\\pnpm-store -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; "D:\\ node_modules  : $\([math]::Round\($nm/1MB,1\)\) MB"; "C:\\ pnpm-store   : $\([math]::Round\($store/1MB,1\)\) MB"; "node_modules dir count: $\(\(Get-ChildItem node_modules -Directory\).Count\)")

PowerShell($f = Get-ChildItem node_modules\\.pnpm\\tailwindcss@4.3.0\\node_modules\\tailwindcss -File -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; "Test file: $\($f.FullName\)"; "Size: $\($f.Length\) bytes"; "LinkType: $\($f.LinkType\)"; ""; "--- fsutil hardlink list \(zeigt alle Pfade die diesen physischen Block teilen\) ---"; fsutil hardlink list $f.FullName)

PowerShell(cmd /c 'rmdir node_modules' 2>&1 | Out-String; "node_modules exists: $\(Test-Path node_modules\)"; "C:\\ target still exists: $\(Test-Path C:\\dev-cache\\werkstatt-modules\)"; "C:\\ target is empty: $\(@\(Get-ChildItem C:\\dev-cache\\werkstatt-modules -Force\).Count -eq 0\)")

PowerShell("--- .npmrc vorhanden? ---"; Test-Path .npmrc; if \(Test-Path .npmrc\) { Get-Content .npmrc }; "--- .gitignore enthaelt .npmrc? ---"; \(Select-String -Path .gitignore -Pattern '^\\.npmrc' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -ne $null)
